prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为26308→28088→29715→41690→40639，整体呈明显后移趋势。2021–2023年稳定在2.6–3.0万位，2024年因选科要求调整（物化绑 定）导致位次大幅下滑至41690，2025年小幅回升至40639，近2年基准约4.1万位；本省物理类计划2021年76人→2022年72人→2023年74人→2024年69人→2025年71人 →2026年91人，2026年较2025年扩招20人（+28.2%），扩招幅度较大，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第113名，近年排名在99–113 之间波动，整体处于中后段211水平；该校未出现在学校声誉舆情文件中，整体舆情平稳；抖音热度总排名第50位，评价为"较热"，短视频曝光量中等，未出现 明显负面或断档信号；该校在第五轮学科评估中未列出A-及以上学科，优势学科以交通运输工程、船舶与海洋工程、轮机工程等海事特色学科为主，相关专业在 行业内认可度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等大连海事大学主要招生专业大类在2024–2026年持续高热推荐，社会热度高；江苏省2026年普 通高考考生总数约52.1万人，按2025年物理类占比约72.9%估算，2026年物理类考生约38万人，较2025年物理类26.1万人大幅增加，竞争加剧。；大连海事大学位于辽宁大连，属非本省院校；该校在江苏省招生占比约2–3%（ 2025年物理类+历史类合计约84人），江苏省非该校主要生源地，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类计划大幅扩招28.2%（缓解竞争）、江苏省考生总数 明显增加（加剧竞争）、学校声誉平稳、抖音热度中等、计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热等因素，在，考虑扩招带来的位次后移效应被考生规模扩大 部分抵消，且2024年位次已大幅下滑至41690后2025年略有回升至40639，预计2026年位次在40639基础上小幅后移。预测最低位次约42763名，区间42263–43263名。

- 电子信息类（电子信息工程、通信工程、光电信息科学与工程等）

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 26308 → 28088 → 29715 → 41690 → 40639, showing a clear backward trend overall. From 2021 to 2023, it stabilized around 26,000–30,000. In 2024, due to adjustments in subject requirements (physics and chemistry binding), the ranking dropped significantly to 41690. In 2025, it slightly recovered to 40639, with a recent two-year baseline of approximately 41,000. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan: 2021: 76 → 2022: 72 → 2023: 74 → 2024: 69 → 2025: 71 → 2026: 91. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 20 students (+28.2%), a relatively large increase, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking around 113th in 2026, fluctuating between 99–113 in recent years, overall at a mid-to-late 211 level. The school does not appear in the school reputation public opinion documents, with overall stable public opinion. Douyin heat ranking 50th, rated as 'relatively hot', with moderate short video exposure, no obvious negative or gap signals. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, no A- or above disciplines were listed. Advantageous disciplines are mainly maritime specialties such as Transportation Engineering, Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, and Marine Engineering, which are highly recognized within the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other major enrollment categories at Dalian Maritime University have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Jiangsu Province is approximately 521,000. Based on the 2025 Physics Category proportion of about 72.9%, the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in 2026 is about 380,000, a significant increase from 261,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Dalian Maritime University is located in Dalian, Liaoning, a non-provincial institution. Its enrollment proportion in Jiangsu Province is about 2–3% (approximately 84 students in Physics and History categories combined in 2025). Jiangsu is not the main source province for this university, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant 28.2% expansion in the 2026 Physics Category plan (easing competition), the notable increase in total examinees in Jiangsu Province (intensifying competition), stable school reputation, moderate Douyin heat, and sustained high popularity of majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, the backward shift effect from expansion is partially offset by the increase in examinee numbers. Given that the 2024 ranking dropped sharply to 41690 and then slightly recovered to 40639 in 2025, it is predicted that the 2026 ranking will shift slightly backward from 40639. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 42763, with a range of 42263–43263.

- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Automation (Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instrumentation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Management Science and Engineering (Information Management and Information Systems, Big Data Management and Application, E-commerce)
- English (only for English test takers).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (42263–43263), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<42263), prioritize Tier 1 popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information. For rankings near the upper bound (>43263), mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 5464 → 5607 → 5997 → 4028 → 5300, showing significant fluctuations. Rankings slowly moved backward between 5464 and 5997 from 2021 to 2023, then sharply advanced to 4028 in 2024 (historical low), and rebounded to 5300 in 2025, with a recent two-year baseline around 5300. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 13 in 2021 → 13 in 2022 → 13 in 2023 → 12 in 2024 → 13 in 2025 → 14 in 2026, with an increase of 1 student (+7.7%) in 2026 compared to 2025, a relatively small expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 113th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with recent rankings fluctuating between 99 and 113. The university does not appear in school reputation and public opinion documents, indicating overall stable public opinion. Douyin heat ranking is 50th, rated as 'relatively hot', with no obvious negative or gap signals. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, no A- or above disciplines were listed. History Category enrollment majors mainly include Law, Economics, Business Administration, and Maritime Management, with Law having a relatively high social heat.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major's social heat from 2024 to 2026 is characterized by divergence and wait-and-see, overall relatively hot but competitive. Economics major's heat is also divergent and wait-and-see. The total number of ordinary college entrance exam candidates in Jiangsu Province in 2026 is approximately 521,000. Based on the 2025 History Category proportion of about 27.1%, the estimated number of History Category candidates in 2026 is about 141,000, a significant increase from 97,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Dalian Maritime University is located in Dalian, Liaoning, and is not a local institution. Jiangsu Province is not its main source of students, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the small expansion of 1 student in the 2026 History Category plan (limited relief of competition), the significant increase in History Category candidates in Jiangsu Province (intensifying competition), stable school reputation, and relatively hot Law major, and given that the 2025 ranking of 5300 has rebounded significantly from 4028 in 2024, the competition intensification effect from the increase in 2026 candidates outweighs the expansion effect. The ranking is expected to slightly move backward from 5300. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5450, with a range of 5350–5550.
